design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px max width, 2–3 line clamp; AIDA pass=true; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense present; label_sweep=all competitors + computer-use cache twice; button_contrast=black/white pills verified
headline: Book rides with AI — compare ETAs, coordinate pickups, and reuse routes

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Book rides with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Book rides with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can help request rides, compare ETAs, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated route preferences

summary: An indexable use‑case page showing how Super helps people book and coordinate rides with a real computer‑using AI agent. The page explains the workflow, shows where a reusable computer‑use cache makes repeated routes faster and cheaper, positions Super against Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Folk, and Orchids, and links into the broader /use‑cases/ cluster.
